item.title: The reaction after this one is almost better than the compliment itself.
item.description: The response made the heartfelt compliment even more unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: The reaction after this one is almost better than the compliment itself.

item.title: I wish I could get past his below the belt worm… because we vibedddd
item.description: Sometimes one dealbreaker is all it takes to ruin an otherwise perfect vibe.

media:content.media:description: Sometimes one dealbreaker is all it takes to ruin an otherwise perfect vibe.
